response.justification: Candidate has strong hands-on engineering experience (13+ years) and some teaching/workshop background, but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at the scale required, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work. The role explicitly requires 2+ years people management and 3+ years building developer tools as a function — neither is evidenced. Workshops and an open-source project are positive signals but insufficient for a Level II Engineering Manager role focused on engineering productivity.
strengths: 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded
Demonstrated teaching, mentoring, and community leadership via workshops, dojos, and courses
Exposure to CI/CD, DevOps tooling, and test-driven development practices
concerns: No formal people-management or direct-report experience documented
Lacks dedicated developer-tools / build-systems / test-infrastructure role experience
No mobile-platform ecosystem (iOS/Android tooling) background relevant to the team's focus

key_factors.factor: Strong IC engineering breadth and mentoring track record
